title: Stewart Rosman
compiled_truth: Stewart Rosman is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-03-08), Stewart Rosman sent 37 and received 462 emails, totalling 499 interactions.
